docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LITTLE, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT JORY, KIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTLE, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JORY, KIT $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,640.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JORY, KIT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED APR-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JORY, KIT
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
